diff:
diff --git a/SubProjects/Albanese/blueprint/src/chapters/Albanese_Thm32RationalMapExtension.tex b/SubProjects/Albanese/blueprint/src/chapters/Albanese_Thm32RationalMapExtension.tex
index c30f2f8..d3041d1 100644
--- a/SubProjects/Albanese/blueprint/src/chapters/Albanese_Thm32RationalMapExtension.tex
+++ b/SubProjects/Albanese/blueprint/src/chapters/Albanese_Thm32RationalMapExtension.tex
@@ -263,16 +263,18 @@ mathematical source; each is a packaging step internal to the formalisation.
 [Codim-1-freeness of a rational map into an abelian variety]
   \label{lem:av_codimOneFree_of_indeterminacy}
   \lean{AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.RationalMap.av_codimOneFree_of_indeterminacy}
-  \uses{lem:av_isIntegral_of_smooth_geomIrred, lem:codimOneFree_of_indeterminacyLocus_eq_empty, lem:milne_codim1_indeterminacy}
+  \uses{lem:av_isIntegral_of_smooth_geomIrred, lem:codimOneFree_of_indeterminacyLocus_eq_empty, lem:milne_codim1_indeterminacy, thm:indeterminacy_codimGe2}
   For a rational map \(f \colon X \dashrightarrow A\) from a nonsingular variety
   \(X\) to an abelian variety \(A\) over an algebraically closed field \(\bar k\),
   the map \(f\) is \(\mathrm{CodimOneFree}\): every codimension-\(1\) point of
   \(X\) lies in \(f.\mathrm{domain}\). The pure-codim-\(1\)-or-empty dichotomy of
   Milne's Lemma~3.3 (\cref{lem:milne_codim1_indeterminacy}, applied with
   \(A.\mathrm{left}\) integral by
-  \cref{lem:av_isIntegral_of_smooth_geomIrred}) is combined with the codim-\(\geq
-  2\) conclusion to force the indeterminacy locus empty, whence the empty-locus
-  branch (\cref{lem:codimOneFree_of_indeterminacyLocus_eq_empty}) concludes.
+  \cref{lem:av_isIntegral_of_smooth_geomIrred}) is combined with the codim-\(\geq 2\) conclusion of Milne's Theorem~3.1
+  (\cref{thm:indeterminacy_codimGe2}) to force the indeterminacy locus empty:
+  a codimension-\(1\) point of the locus would have coheight both \(1\) and
+  \(\geq 2\). The empty-locus branch
+  (\cref{lem:codimOneFree_of_indeterminacyLocus_eq_empty}) concludes.
   \begin{proof}
     Proved directly in Lean.
   \end{proof}
